158:22640.name: "Experience design is a critical component of business success. Professional experience designers dedicate themselves to solving unseen pain points. I'm Kiki Sun, a complex problem-solver specializing in identifying issues through rigorous user research and addressing emotional experience challenges with rational thinking. My expertise in the consumer goods sector has revolutionized user experience and operational efficiency for digital innovation projects I've led."
